308],[242,547,1776530600322],[254,544,1776530600332],[267,540,1776530600344],[279,536,1776530600358],[287,534,1776530600370],[291,532,1776530600384],[292,532,1776530600403],[292,531,1776530600419],[292,530,1776530600432],[291,529,1776530600447],[291,527,1776530600459],[291,526,1776530600481],[291,524,1776530600490],[291,523,1776530600505],[291,522,1776530600524],[290,522,1776530600539],[289,521,1776530600554],[288,520,1776530600572],[287,519,1776530600580],[286,518,1776530600596],[286,517,1776530600607],[285,517,1776530600620],[284,516,1776530600632],[283,515,1776530600643],[282,515,1776530600654],[283,516,1776530600680],[283,517,1776530600685],[284,518,1776530600693],[284,519,1776530600704],[285,520,1776530600711],[286,521,1776530600729],[287,522,1776530600743],[287,523,1776530600747],[288,524,1776530600753],[289,525,1776530600768]],"mm-mp":20.174022698612863,"md":[[290,523,1776530600510]],"md-mp":3572.5,"mu":[[290,523,1776530600668]],"mu-mp":3594.5},"v":1,"tc":{}}
